title: Lead Investment Banker at New India Assurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at New India Assurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
